## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` passes (fmt + clippy + test + deny + lint)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Public API changes are documented (`rustdoc`)
- [ ] Doc changes verified with `mdbook build` (if applicable)
- [ ] No MSRV regression (or documented in this PR if intentional)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat`, `fix`, `perf`, `refactor`, `docs`, `test`, `ci`, `chore`)

## Impact

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Breaking API change
- [ ] New public API
- [ ] Format roundtrip affected
- [ ] MSRV change
- [ ] Performance impact
- [ ] New dependency
